stemHtml: Compared with a balanced field with no stopway or clearway, the use of a stopway in the take-off calculations allows to...

options.a: increase the Take-Off Mass, and increase the V<sub>1</sub>.
options.b: decrease the Take-Off Mass, and decrease the V<sub>1</sub>.
options.c: increase the Take-Off Mass, and decrease the V<sub>1</sub>.
options.d: decrease the Take-Off Mass, and increase the V<sub>1</sub>.
